description: Power BI deployment pipeline configuration for Clearwater Health Analytics. Defines Dev → Test → Prod promotion stages for reports, semantic model, and paginated reports. Replaces the legacy manual SSRS .rdl file copy and Crystal Reports file-share deployment.

pipeline.name: Clearwater Health Analytics Pipeline
pipeline.description: Three-stage deployment pipeline for promoting Power BI content from development through testing to production. Ensures quality gates are met before reports reach end users.

stages.name: Development
stages.description: Development workspace for building and iterating on reports. BI developers publish here from Power BI Desktop. Replaces the legacy pattern of developing .rdl files locally and testing against the dev SSRS server.
purpose: Semantic model schema changes and DAX measure development
New paginated report authoring in Report Builder
Integration testing with refreshed development dataset

dataSource.description: Development Azure SQL database with anonymized patient data (no PHI). Refreshed weekly from production with data masking applied.

accessPolicy.notes: No Viewer role in Dev — only developers and analysts access this workspace

qualityGates.description: Checks that must pass before promoting from Dev to Test

checks.name: Dataset refresh succeeds
checks.description: Semantic model refresh completes without errors against the dev database

checks.name: No DAX errors
checks.description: All DAX measures and calculated columns evaluate without errors

checks.name: RLS roles defined
checks.description: Verify DepartmentRole, PhysicianRole, and ExecutiveRole are defined in the semantic model (see Security/rls-roles.json)

checks.name: Visual rendering check
checks.description: All report pages render without visual-level errors or missing data

stages.name: Test
stages.description: Testing and UAT workspace. Content is promoted here from Dev for stakeholder validation, RLS testing, and subscription testing. Replaces the legacy pattern of deploying .rdl files to the SSRS staging server.
purpose: RLS role validation using 'Test as Role' (see Security/test-matrix.md)
Subscription delivery testing — verify email format and RLS filtering
Parallel comparison with legacy SSRS/Crystal output

dataSource.description: Test Azure SQL database with production-scale data (anonymized PHI). Used for performance validation and data accuracy comparison against legacy reports.

roles.notes: Key stakeholders from each audience group participate in UAT

qualityGates.description: Checks that must pass before promoting from Test to Prod

checks.name: Dataset refresh succeeds
checks.description: Semantic model refresh completes against production-scale test data

checks.name: RLS validation passed
checks.description: All test scenarios from Security/test-matrix.md pass — DepartmentRole, PhysicianRole, ExecutiveRole, and no-role scenarios verified

checks.name: Data accuracy validated
checks.description: Report output compared against legacy SSRS/Crystal output for the same date ranges. Revenue totals, patient counts, quality scores, and complication rates match within acceptable tolerance (±0.01%)

checks.name: Subscription test delivery
checks.description: Test subscriptions sent to stakeholder group. PDF/Excel attachments validated for formatting, completeness, and RLS-filtered data accuracy

checks.name: Paginated report print test
checks.description: Paginated reports (MonthEndFinancial, JointCommission, CMSSubmission) exported to PDF and printed. Layout, page breaks, headers/footers, and signature blocks verified

checks.name: Stakeholder sign-off
checks.description: CFO, Quality Director, and Nursing Supervisor confirm reports meet requirements. Sign-off documented before production promotion

checks.name: Performance acceptable
checks.description: Report page load times under 5 seconds for interactive reports. Dataset refresh completes within 30-minute window

stages.name: Production
stages.description: Production workspace serving end users via the Clearwater Health Analytics Power BI App. Content is promoted here from Test after all quality gates pass. This is the workspace referenced by workspace-config.json and app-config.json.
purpose: Production report consumption by all audiences
Active email subscriptions (Daily Revenue, Quality Metrics, Patient Census)
Mobile push notifications and data-driven alerts
Power BI App distribution to Clearwater Health organization

dataSource.description: Production Azure SQL database with live data. Connected via on-premises data gateway during hybrid transition period.
dataSource.refreshSchedule: See subscription-migration.md for per-report refresh schedules (4:30 AM, 6:00 AM, 11:30 AM, 7:30 PM)

accessPolicy.notes: Full role assignment as defined in workspace-config.json

checks.name: Dataset refresh succeeds
checks.description: First production refresh completes successfully after promotion

checks.name: App update published
checks.description: Power BI App updated after content promotion — audiences receive new content via app-config.json navigation

checks.name: Subscription delivery verified
checks.description: First scheduled subscription delivery confirmed for Daily Revenue (7 AM), Quality Metrics (1st of month), and Patient Census (5 AM/12 PM/8 PM)

checks.name: Mobile alerts active
checks.description: Data-driven alerts firing correctly for occupancy > 95%, quality status Red, revenue anomaly, and complication spike thresholds

deploymentRules.description: Rules applied during stage promotion to remap data sources and parameters per environment.

parameterRules.name: Database server override
parameterRules.description: Automatically update the Azure SQL server connection string when content is promoted between stages

parameterRules.name: Database name override
parameterRules.description: Update the database name per environment

dataSourceRules.name: Azure SQL connection
dataSourceRules.description: Remap the semantic model data source connection per stage

automationNotes.description: Optional CI/CD integration for automated deployments using Power BI REST APIs.

cicdIntegration.description: Integrate with Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions to trigger stage promotions after code review approval.
suggestedWorkflow: 1. Developer publishes to Dev workspace from Power BI Desktop
2. Dev quality gates run (automated refresh, DAX validation)
3. Pull request created for semantic model / report changes
4. PR approval triggers promotion from Dev → Test via REST API
5. UAT stakeholders validate in Test workspace
6. Stakeholder sign-off triggers promotion from Test → Prod via REST API
7. Power BI App updated automatically after Prod promotion
